description_long: This jewelry object features a bold, rectangular form with a predominantly red-orange body and a transparent central section, possibly acrylic or glass, that reveals internal decorative elements resembling floating rings and pegs. The front face is adorned with two prominent green circular accents, set into a red base, which may serve as interactive or ornamental features. On one side, two cylindrical protrusions in green and pink extend outward, adding a playful, geometric aspect to the design. The back is smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and modern aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a contemporary, abstract motif, with a focus on vibrant color contrasts and simple, blocky shapes. The piece is likely intended as a statement brooch or pin, designed to be worn on clothing as a bold accessory.
description: A modern, rectangular brooch with a red-orange frame, transparent center, and playful green and pink geometric accents. Features bold color contrasts and abstract decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and two cylindrical green and pink protrusions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the transparent center, internal ring motifs, and two green circular accents on the red base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the cylindrical protrusions but from the other side.
description_view_3: Back view with a smooth, unadorned red-orange surface and no visible decorative elements.
